basic_details.job_title: Deendayal Port Authority Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Deendayal Port Authority Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website www.deendayalport.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Deendayal Port Authority Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: Ex-Serviceman: By the length of military service increased by 3 years; OBC (NCL): 3 Years; Major Port Employees: Up to the age of 55 years

qualification.education_qualification: Engineers Certificates of competency issued under the ISV Act, 1971 OR 4 years regular apprenticeship in Marine Engineering workshop, Degree or its equivalent in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/ Institution
qualification.details: Assistant Manager (Dredger/Tugs): Engineers Certificates of competency issued under the ISV Act, 1971 OR 4 years regular apprenticeship in Marine Engineering workshop recognized by the Ministry/Govt. of India. Post qualification experience of two years as watch keeping Engineering in ocean going vessels OR Four years' experience as Engineer Room Artificer OR in higher post in the Indian Navy with two years' experience as watch keeping engineer on ocean going vessels. Assistant Manager (Floating Crafts): Degree or its equivalent in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/ Institution. Post qualification experience of three years in maintenance of marine electrical installation or Should have worked as Chief Electrical Artificer in Indian Navy.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Deendayal Port Authority Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.deendayalport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.deendayal_port_authority: Engineers Certificates of competency issued under the ISV Act, 1971 OR 4 years regular apprenticeship in Marine Engineering workshop, Degree or its equivalent in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/ Institution

content_sections.heading: Deendayal Port Authority Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Deendayal Port Authority Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Deendayal Port Authority Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Deendayal Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Deendayal Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Manager (Dredger/Tugs): Engineers Certificates of competency issued under the ISV Act, 1971 OR 4 years regular apprenticeship in Marine Engineering workshop recognized by the Ministry/Govt. of India. Post qualification experience of two years as watch keeping Engineering in ocean going vessels OR Four years' experience as Engineer Room Artificer OR in higher post in the Indian Navy with two years' experience as watch keeping engineer on ocean going vessels. Assistant Manager (Floating Crafts): Degree or its equivalent in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/ Institution. Post qualification experience of three years in maintenance of marine electrical installation or Should have worked as Chief Electrical Artificer in Indian Navy.

content_sections.heading: Deendayal Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: Ex-Serviceman: By the length of military service increased by 3 years; OBC (NCL): 3 Years; Major Port Employees: Up to the age of 55 years

content_sections.heading: Deendayal Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
Deendayal Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Crucial Date for determining qualification, experience and age
Last Date for Receipt of Hard Copy Application

content_sections.heading: Deendayal Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Deendayal Port Authority Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.deendayalport.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Deendayal Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Manager posts at Deendayal Port Authority?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Assistant Manager posts is 19th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Manager (Dredger/Tugs) post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Manager (Dredger/Tugs) post, candidates need an Engineers Certificate of competency or a 4-year apprenticeship in Marine Engineering workshop, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Assistant Manager positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Assistant Manager posts is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Manager posts will receive a salary in the IDA pattern, ranging from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 1,40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: Deendayal Port Authority has announced a total of 5 vacancies for the Assistant Manager posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Manager posts will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Which state and city is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Deendayal Port Authority located in Gandhidham, Gujarat, with a pincode of 370201.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Deendayal Port Authority, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.
